task_origin: Prepared by ChatGPT for file-based handoff after RM1.21-B/C/D/E
purpose: Official schema-data kits for native 6-star launch_base heroes plus Borea launch_extra_premium.

design_rules.rarity_identity: 6-star heroes are headline units with strong myth identity and one iconic mechanic each.
design_rules.effect_budget: 3-4 effects allowed when identity supports it
design_rules.advanced_mechanics: allowed as design data; runtime_supported=false notes included where mechanics are not yet implemented
design_rules.runtime_policy: design-data only; no DB/runtime behavior implied until imported and implemented explicitly

greek_athena.name: Atena

kit_complexity.rarity_rule: 6★ complete signature kit with iconic mechanic required

basic_attack.name: Colpo Primordiale
basic_attack.description: Attacco base di rarità divina, coerente con elemento e ruolo.

skill.name: Egida Strategica
skill.description: Taunta i nemici single-target e protegge il team con riduzione danni.

ultimate_or_special.name: Giudizio della Polis
ultimate_or_special.description: Danneggia tutti i nemici, riduce la loro difesa e aumenta la resistenza alleata.

passive.name: Intelletto Bellico
passive.description: Quando un alleato viene colpito da single-target, Atena ottiene Egida. Ogni terzo colpo contro il team riduce il danno subito.
passive.implementation_note: Iconic 6★ passive; requires explicit runtime implementation before live activation.

runtime_compatibility_notes: schema_data_only
not_imported_to_db
runtime_legacy_mapping provided as compatibility hint only
6★ iconic mechanics require explicit runtime implementation before live activation
Must pass Combat QA Lab before activation
combat_qa_notes: Validate idle, attack, skill, hit, death, scale, no fallback asset, no unwanted glow.
Validate signature mechanic in Combat QA Lab after runtime support exists.
Validate full 6-enemy AoE setup for AoE/control kits where applicable.
